hooks.statusMessage: Copying artifacts to OneDrive Windows folder...
hooks.command: $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($data.tool_response.exitCode -eq 0) { $dst = 'D:\Andy Tuke\Music - Music Software\TDP\Windows\'; Copy-Item 'd:\Dev\mu-clid\build\mu-clid_artefacts\Debug\Standalone\mu-Clid.exe' $dst -Force 2>$null; Copy-Item 'd:\Dev\mu-clid\build\mu-clid_artefacts\Debug\VST3\mu-Clid.vst3' $dst -Recurse -Force 2>$null; Copy-Item 'd:\Dev\mu-clid\build\mu-clid_artefacts\Debug\CLAP\mu-Clid.clap' $dst -Force 2>$null }
